compound: ONE crate, THREE source sub-adapters (eu/fr/de) -> THREE disclosure_regime rows + THREE details-schema sets (regime doc docs/regimes/eu_fr_de_annual.md §0). Conformance dispatches by the single name `eu_fr_de_annual` over source-namespaced fixtures `fixtures/{eu,fr,de}_<case>/`; the source is encoded in the case-dir prefix. record_type = interest on every row (first periodic_declaration regimes). value = EUR exact (low==high) or NULL — no floats (invariant 7).
captured_by: test-designer (goal 064 leg B). expected.*.json are the test-designer's INDEPENDENT ground truth, authored with ZERO adapter/LLM/parser involvement: the values were read directly from the pinned source bytes by the test-designer (FR: read the HATVP XML; EU: read the DPI PDF visually + a pdftotext -layout cross-check; DE: read the browser-captured rendered disclosure HTML). A small Node expander (.capture-064b/build.mjs, NOT committed) applied the documented per-source mapping to the hand-transcribed rows and emitted the StagingRow/GoldCandidate JSON — it never parsed a source document. Records publish `unverified` -> sampling-audit queue per docs/decisions/automation-policy.md (the goal's 'HUMAN completes expected.*.json' step is superseded).
spec: docs/regimes/eu_fr_de_annual.md — §0 architecture, §0.1 shared conventions (record_type interest, value->ValueInterval, owner, fail-closed), §0.2 legal (FR patrimony OUT), §EU (DPI multilingual PDF, §EU.4 Silver, §EU.5 details, §EU.6 vision, §EU.7 fixtures), §FR (HATVP DIA XML, §FR.3 sections, §FR.4 Silver, §FR.5 details, §FR.6 deterministic, §FR.7 fixtures), §DE (Bundestag bot-gated HTML, §DE.3 8 categories + exact-euro format, §DE.4 Silver, §DE.5 details, §DE.7 strategy, §DE.8 fixtures — pins DEFERRED, now ESTABLISHED here).

fetch_methods.eu: PLAIN polite HTTPS (served 200 to the identified client, 063a). The 3 DPI PDFs were fetched in 063a and archived under docs/regimes/eu_fr_de_annual/evidence/eu/ sha-named; this leg copies those byte-exact archives into fixtures/eu_*/input.pdf (sha256 == the SAF §EU.7 raw-byte pins). No re-fetch this leg (Bronze is sacred; the 063a bytes ARE the pinned version).
fetch_methods.fr: PLAIN polite HTTPS from the HATVP open-data path livraison/dossiers/*.xml (served, Etalab open licence, 063a). The 3 per-declaration XML were fetched in 063a and archived under evidence/fr/ sha-named; copied byte-exact into fixtures/fr_*/input.xml (sha256 == SAF §FR.7 pins).
fetch_methods.de: BROWSER-ENGINE SEAM (this leg, 064b). www.bundestag.de is Enodia/Radware bot-gated: every non-browser client gets HTTP 400 /.enodia/challenge (SAF §DE.2, E-DE-block). A REAL headless Chromium (Playwright 1.61.1 chromium-1228, HeadlessChrome/149) solves the JS proof-of-work automatically (400 -> 200 with a ?enodia=<token> redirect) and the 'Veröffentlichungspflichtige Angaben' block is SERVER-RENDERED into the raw main-document response body. The raw response bytes (response.body(), NOT page.content() DOM re-serialization — fixture-capture skill) were pinned. This ESTABLISHES the DE raw-byte pins the SAF §DE.8 deferred. NO fingerprint evasion; the browser's own UA is kept and a From: contact header is added scoped to www.bundestag.de.

politeness.eu: 063a: concurrency 1, >=3s spacing (europarl robots Crawl-delay 3), identified UA `govfolio.io research (contact: ssm.leo@outlook.com)` + From. Served 200 throughout.
politeness.fr: 063a: concurrency 1, >=2s spacing, identified UA + From. Served 200 throughout.
politeness.de: 064b browser seam: identified via `From: ssm.leo@outlook.com` header route-scoped to www.bundestag.de (never context-global — From is not CORS-safelisted, would force preflights that kill CDN JS on third-party hosts; fixture-capture skill). Browser's own HeadlessChrome UA kept (a bot UA trips Enodia). Concurrency 1, sequential with >=2.5s spacing. Discovery: 1 index warmup + a paginated filterlist ajax sweep (636 MdB, ~54 calls @0.6s to enumerate members) + a 10-member probe batch (@2.5s) + the 3-member final capture (@2.5s). Zero 429s, zero fingerprint evasion. Full log: docs/regimes/eu_fr_de_annual/evidence/2026-07-05-eu_fr_de_annual-de-capture-064b.retrieval.json.
politeness.note_no_refetch_eu_fr: EU + FR did NOT hit the network this leg — the 063a byte-exact archives were reused (evidence bytes == fixture bytes == SAF pins, verified by sha256).

eu_eur_exact.covers: EUR-exact income -> ValueInterval exact (11000 EUR monthly; 50 EUR hourly). Greek-language form (entry_text verbatim Greek). sections B-G empty. confidence 0.98 (vision base).

eu_pln_multilingual.covers: NON-EUR + multilingual: fully Polish form; exact PLN amounts + miesięcznie/kwartalnie periodicity -> value NULL + value_source unmapped_currency + income_currency 'PLN' kept (Currency enum lacks PLN, §0.1). A holding in section (D) -> asset_class equity. 'informacja publiczna' MEP-salary row + `Brak`(X) none rows -> value NULL. Section A(10) + B(5) + C(4) + D(1). confidence 0.93 on PLN-income rows (vision base 0.98 -0.05 non-EUR), 0.98 on income-less rows.

eu_english_baseline.covers: English baseline / grammar reference (term-9). Single section-(A) row: 'Member of the European Parliament' with benefit_nature 'The income I receive as Member of the European Parliament is public information' -> value NULL, value_source none. The qualitative/public-information case.

fr_comprehensive.covers: Comprehensive AND a modificative (declarationModificative=true). All in-scope section types: activProfCinqDerniere (5, exact per-year montants -> value = LATEST year 43658/11024/38221/22330/70531 EUR; note 104778 is the 2021 peak, rides details.montants), activProfConjoint (spouse -> owner spouse, value NULL), fonctionBenevole (value NULL), mandatElectif (13254 EUR), participationDirigeant (montant 0 -> value NULL), participationFinanciere x2 (equity, value NULL). Serves as the fixture-set's comprehensive case (see flags: Firmin deferred).

fr_neant.covers: Minimal / neant: all sections neant=true EXCEPT one participationDirigeant (unpaid association 'association canuts solidarité', montant all 0 -> value NULL) + an observationInteretDto free-text note (EXCLUDED from Silver/Gold, §flags). organe empty in the XML -> organe null.

fr_modificative.covers: The `diam` (modificative filename) path: type_declaration DIAM but declarationModificative=false in the XML (is_modificative reflects the actual bool, §flags). activProfCinqDerniere (exact montants -> value 34429 EUR latest), activProfConjoint (spouse declares 'NEANT' -> owner spouse, value NULL, structural row §flags), participationDirigeant x2 (montant 0 -> value NULL). Same politician as fr_neant.

de_income_beteiligung.covers: Exact income AND Beteiligung in one compact page. Category 2 (Entgeltliche Tätigkeiten): 'monatlich, 1.000,00 EUR, Gewinnausschüttung' -> value 1000.00 EUR (period monthly, value_source betragsgenau) + an anonymised contract-partner list (Mandant 3/5/28/33/65/67) in partner_raw. Category 7 (Beteiligungen an Kapital-/Personengesellschaften) x2 -> asset_class equity, value NULL (income cross-referenced to cat 2).

de_income_functions.covers: Exact euro income inside function categories 3 + 4 ('monatlich, 300,00 EUR' Aufsichtsrat; 'monatlich, 508,00 EUR' Stadtrat) with 'zuzüglich Summe unregelmäßiger Zahlungen' supplements kept verbatim in amount_raw but NOT promoted to value (§flags). Cat 1 Rückkehrrecht + 7 ehrenamtlich Vereins-functions (value NULL, ehrenamtlich=true).

de_functions_only.covers: Functions-only / qualitative: categories 1,3,4,5 with NO published euro amounts (value NULL every row), many ehrenamtlich. A multi-function entity (Deutsche Orient-Stiftung: Kuratorium + Präsident joined with ' · '). The value-NULL baseline.

conformance_conventions.silver_shape: expected.silver.json = Vec<pipeline::StagingRow> = [{payload, confidence}]. payload carries every regime-doc §*.4 field INCLUDING `extractor`, EXCEPT `confidence` (wrapper-level f32). Deep-compared key-order-insensitive (serde_json Value ==), so payload key order is irrelevant to pass/fail.
conformance_conventions.gold_shape: expected.gold.json = Vec<core::domain::gold::GoldCandidate>. record_type interest -> validate() requires nothing extra (side/transaction_date/as_of_date all null). value: EUR exact ValueInterval {low,high,currency} with low==high as decimal STRINGS (invariant 7) OR null. instrument_id null (company/entity free text stays below-threshold, invariant 3). fingerprint null (computed at promotion, Task 6). owner: self default; spouse for FR activProfConjointDto; null unused. asset_class: equity for FR participationFinanciereDto + EU section (D) + DE category 7 (Beteiligungen); else other. notified_date: FR = dateDepot date; EU = declaration date; DE = null (no per-entry date; page-capture date NOT fabricated, §DE.5).
conformance_conventions.confidence_literals: THREE f32 images (serde_json casts f32->f64, ryu-shortest): FR + DE deterministic rows = 1.0 (JSON literal `1.0`); EU vision rows = 0.9800000190734863 (the f64 image of 0.98_f32) baseline, and 0.9300000071525574 (0.93_f32 = base 0.98 -0.05 for a PLN/non-EUR income row, §EU.6). NEVER emit integer `1` (serde_json PosInt deep-compares UNEQUAL to Float 1.0) nor bare `0.98`. Same silver `confidence` and gold `extraction_confidence` per row.

conformance_ids.rationale: Conformance runs pool:None so filing/politician/regime ids cannot resolve from a roster. These fixed Crockford-valid ULID constants (26 chars, no I/L/O/U, leading 0 so 128 bits fit) are the contract the adapter MUST emit in conformance mode; production resolves real ids from Postgres. Source-prefixed: EPD (EU Parliament DPI), FRH (FR HATVP), DEB (DE Bundestag). Type codes REG/FNG/MBR (regime/filing/member). All rows of one fixture share one filing_id + politician_id; a source's rows share one regime_id.

details_contracts.eu_parliament_dpi.interest: EuParliamentDpiInterestDetailsV1 (§EU.5): dpi_uuid, version_ts, mep_id, parliamentary_term, section (A..G), row_ordinal, entry_text, income_amount_raw (string|null verbatim), income_currency (string|null — parsed ISO code 'EUR'/'PLN'/null), periodicity (enum monthly|quarterly|annual|one_off|other|null), benefit_nature (string|null), declaration_date (date), language, value_source (income_amount|none|unmapped_currency).
details_contracts.fr_hatvp_dia.interest: FrHatvpDiaInterestDetailsV1 (§FR.5, refined): declaration_stem, declaration_uuid, type_declaration, is_modificative, section_tag, row_ordinal, motif (CREATION|MODIFICATION|SUPPRESSION), entry_fields (object string->string, the item's scalar child elements verbatim whitespace-normalized — REPLACES the SAF's fixed company/activity/comment triple to faithfully carry heterogeneous per-section children, australia entry_fields precedent), montants (array {year:int, amount:decimal-string}), brut_net (Net|Brut|null), organe (string|null), language (const fr), value_source (montant_latest_year|none).
details_contracts.de_bundestag.interest: DeBundestagInterestDetailsV1 (§DE.5): mdb_id, wahlperiode, category_number (1..8), category_name, row_ordinal, entry_text, amount_raw (string|null verbatim), period (monthly|annual|one_off|null), amount_year (int|null), partner (string|null), profit_before_tax (bool), non_quantifiable (bool), ehrenamtlich (bool), language (const de), value_source (betragsgenau|stufe_historical|none).
details_contracts.schema_placement: The build leg snapshot-commits crates/pipeline/schemas/details/{eu_parliament_dpi,fr_hatvp_dia,de_bundestag}.interest.json from the schemars types in the adapter crate, and adds the THREE (regime, Interest) arms to crates/pipeline/src/conformance.rs details_schema().

builder_notes.harness_registry: conformance.rs details_schema() currently has NO eu_fr_de_annual arms — the harness fails closed (Ok(None) -> 'no details schema registered') for ALL THREE regimes until the build leg adds THREE arms: ('eu_parliament_dpi', Interest), ('fr_hatvp_dia', Interest), ('de_bundestag', Interest), each include_str! its snapshot-committed schema. `cargo run -p pipeline --bin conformance -- eu_fr_de_annual` is intentionally not wired yet (no conformance_entry bin, scaffold-only crate). Do NOT hack the harness to go green.
builder_notes.compound_dispatch: The Adapter impl reads the Source discriminant (eu/fr/de) from the fixture case-dir prefix (or FilingRef in prod) and dispatches parse/normalize + regime() to the matching sub-module. run_case_inner calls adapter.regime().code per fixture to pick the details schema — the compound adapter must return the per-fixture source regime code, not a single constant.
builder_notes.eu: LLM-vision regime (like australia_register / us_house scanned_paper_ptr). CACHE PRIMING: this leg ships input.pdf + expected.silver.json + expected.gold.json + this MANIFEST ONLY — it does NOT author extraction.cache.json. PRECEDENT (australia MANIFEST / us_house 77740d8->2dfed7a): the BUILDER primes the cache mechanically from each expected.silver.json via pipeline::extraction::prime_from_expected_silver, so conformance parse() returns the test-designer's Silver verbatim (no live LLM). Priming key per case: CacheKey { document_sha256 = the case sha256 above, extractor_tag = 'eu_parliament_dpi/llm@1', model_id = <builder's primary vision model> }. NON-EUR RULE: a parsed-but-unlisted currency (PLN) -> value NULL + income_currency kept + value_source 'unmapped_currency' + a review_task 'unmapped_currency' (the Currency enum extension EUR->+PLN/HUF/... is a founder/core decision, SAF open question — do NOT extend it to make value non-null here).
builder_notes.fr: DETERMINISTIC XML (no LLM). value = the LATEST declared year's montant (max annee) as exact EUR (low==high) when >0, else NULL; ALL years ride details.montants as decimal strings (space-thousands stripped, invariant 7). asset_description_raw = the section's PRIMARY descriptive field ONLY (activProfCinqDerniere/activConsultant->description; activProfConjoint->activiteProf; fonctionBenevole->nomStructure; mandatElectif->descriptionMandat; participationDirigeant/participationFinanciere->nomSociete); every other child rides details.entry_fields verbatim. owner spouse ONLY for activProfConjointDto. asset_class equity ONLY for participationFinanciereDto (its evaluation/capitalDetenu are NOT promoted to value — value derives ONLY from a remuneration montant year-array, so participationFinanciere value is always NULL here; SAF §FR.5). Text is XML-unescaped + whitespace-normalized (trim + collapse internal runs incl. the '[Données non publiées]' redaction token). fetch = plain reqwest; cache by sha.
builder_notes.de: DETERMINISTIC HTML behind the MANDATORY browser-engine fetch seam (Enodia gate, §DE.2) — unavailable seam => freeze + review_task, never evasion. Parse with `scraper`: the disclosure is under `div.e-collapse__content div.m-biography__infos`, a sequence of `<h3>` category headings each followed by `<ul class="voa_list bt-liste">` ENTRIES; ONE StagingRow per entry <ul>. Within an entry: first `<li>` = organisation (name, location); following `<li>`(s) = role/function [+ published income]; a NESTED `<ul>` = anonymised contract partners (Mandant N, sector, years). entry_text_raw = entity + ' — ' + role (multiple role lines joined ' · '); amount_raw = the published income string(s) joined; partner_raw = the nested Mandant list joined '; '. value = the FIRST REGULAR published amount (the number after monatlich/jährlich/einmalig before Euro/EUR, German 1.250,43 -> strip dots, ','->'.' -> Decimal; low==high EUR); period from that keyword; 'zuzüglich Summe unregelmäßiger Zahlungen' supplements + secondary '(ab YYYY)' figures are NOT promoted to value (kept in amount_raw/details). No amount / ehrenamtlich-only / Beteiligung / Mandant-only -> value NULL, value_source none. category_number 1..8 mapped from the <h3> heading (§DE.3). ESTABLISHED PINS: the SAF §DE.8 raw-byte pins are now the 3 sha256 above (browser seam, this leg) — the build/audit leg should backfill §DE.8 (that methodology page is founder-gated, so NOT edited here). DE bytes carry per-session enodia tokens in embedded links so they are NOT byte-reproducible on re-fetch, but the committed input.html is byte-stable (the pin) and the disclosure DATA is deterministic; §DE.6 10-Stufen historical banding is OUT of scope (21. WP publishes exact euro, not bands).

flags_and_uncertainties: SPYRAKI mep_id 125064 is NOT evidence-backed in 063a (her declarations tab / full-list entry was not archived; the DPI URL does not encode the mep_id). Recorded `unverified`; sampling-audit to confirm. It does NOT affect Gold (politician_id is the ULID constant 0EPDMBR...3). Aftias 256820 + Adamowicz 197490 ARE from SAF §EU.7.

FIRMIN LE BODO (SAF §EU/§FR.7 fr-1 'comprehensive', evidence/fr/716e5591....dia-firmin-le-bodo.xml) is ARCHIVED + available but was NOT made a fixture this leg: its 44 in-scope rows (23 participationFinanciere with free-text remuneration scalars that are pure verbatim passthrough adding no mapping coverage beyond Pannier) carry high transcription risk for marginal coverage gain. fr_comprehensive (Pannier) covers every section type incl. equity + multi-year exact montants AND is itself a modificative. Firmin can be added as a 4th fixture in a follow-up if the founder wants the spec-exact pick; flagged as a deviation from SAF §FR.7.

FR asset_description_raw = the section PRIMARY field only (not a join) — a refinement of SAF §FR.5's 'activite+nomSociete+commentaire join' which does not fit the heterogeneous per-section child names (activProf has description/employeur, not nomSociete/activite). All other children preserved in details.entry_fields. Deterministic; the builder matches per-section.

FR activCollaborateursDto (owner NULL per SAF §FR.3) AND observationInteretDto (free-text) are EXCLUDED from Silver+Gold this leg: collaborateurs declares third-party parliamentary-staff activities (private individuals, not a politician interest) and observations are document-level free text with no per-row home. Both preserved byte-exact in Bronze (input.xml). Documented deviation from SAF §FR.3 (fail-closed-conservative); revisit if the founder wants collaborateur conflict-info indexed.

FR value = LATEST declared year's montant (SAF §FR.5). participationFinanciereDto carries evaluation/capitalDetenu/nombreParts but NO remuneration year-array -> value NULL (evaluation is NOT promoted to value — that would be an interpretive leap; kept in details.entry_fields). Flagged: equity holdings show no value in v1.

FR fr_modificative (Lahmar diam): type_declaration DIAM (from the filename stem) but declarationModificative=false in the XML -> is_modificative reflects the actual XML bool (false), not the filename. The activProfConjoint item declares 'NEANT' (spouse has nothing) -> kept as a structural spouse row with asset_description 'NEANT' (faithful to the item's presence; semantically empty — flagged for audit).

EU confidence penalty (SAF §EU.6): applied -0.05 to PLN/non-EUR income rows (0.98->0.93); the -0.02 language-auto-detect penalty was NOT applied (el/pl/en all cleanly identified). Because the builder primes the extraction cache FROM expected.silver.json, these confidences round-trip verbatim in conformance; the transcription FAITHFULNESS (not conformance) is what the sampling-audit verifies.

EU section (D) asset_class = equity (SAF §EU.5 allows equity/private; the Adamowicz D-row 'udziałowiec spółki z ograniczoną odpowiedzialnością' = shareholder in a limited-liability company -> equity). DE category 7 (Beteiligungen) likewise equity.

DE value = first REGULAR published amount only; multi-figure entries (e.g. gutting-style 'jährlich, 8.000 (bis 2025); jährlich, 9.000 (ab 2026)') and 'unregelmäßige Zahlungen' supplements are kept verbatim in amount_raw/details but NOT in value (fail-closed; a single-figure value avoids inventing a number). All 3 DE fixtures' value-bearing entries have a single clean regular amount (throm 1000, stracke 300 + 508).
DE notified_date = null (no per-entry publication date on the page; the site is 'continuously updated'). Page-capture date is a documented convention, NOT fabricated into notified_date (§DE.5).

DE non_quantifiable = false on all rows (no 'Rechtsposition'/stock-option case observed in these 3 members); the field exists in the contract for that case. profit_before_tax = false (throm's 'Gewinnausschüttung' is a distribution nature kept in amount_raw, not the 'Gewinn vor Steuern' variant).

scaffold_and_blast_radius.scaffold: crates/adapters/eu_fr_de_annual/{Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs} is committed scaffold-only THIS leg so the crates/adapters/* workspace glob stays valid and `cargo test --workspace` is green BEFORE the build leg (us_house CI-red lesson, commit c6dceb7). lib.rs carries no adapter logic. The build leg replaces src/lib.rs with the Adapter impl + src/{eu,fr,de}/{mod,fetch,parse,details}.rs + a conformance_entry bin.
scaffold_and_blast_radius.harness_blast_radius: Verified: no pipeline test globs across crates/adapters/*/fixtures — role_evals/promote/e2e_local/extraction/conformance are hardcoded/scoped to us_house + fixture_fake. These eu_fr_de_annual fixtures + the scaffold crate are inert to every existing test; `cargo test --workspace` compiles the scaffold and runs ZERO eu_fr_de_annual cases (confirmed green this leg).
scaffold_and_blast_radius.eol_pinning: .gitattributes covers `crates/adapters/*/fixtures/** -text` and `docs/regimes/*/evidence/** -text`, so the binary input.pdf and the text input.xml/input.html survive git checkout byte-exact (no CRLF smudge) and the sha256 pins hold. Verify with `git ls-files --eol`.

evidence: docs/regimes/eu_fr_de_annual/evidence/ — 063a reader-extracts + pins (E-* in the SAF §9) and this leg's DE browser-capture retrieval/politeness record 2026-07-05-eu_fr_de_annual-de-capture-064b.retrieval.json.
